draft:
Dear Sir or Madam:

I am writing to provide my strongest recommendation for Mr. Arjun Patel as an individual of extraordinary ability in the field of product management and development. As the Chief Executive Officer at Horizon Interactive, I have had the distinct privilege of working closely with Mr. Patel and witnessing firsthand his remarkable contributions to our company and the broader gaming industry.

To provide some context, Horizon Interactive is a game developer that operates 15 games in active development across various genres, including collectible card games, massively multiplayer online games, and casual games. Our games have been downloaded over 20 million times in the past year, and we have more than 5 million monthly active players. Horizon Interactive also operates PlayHub.com, an online gaming platform that hosts a vast collection of games across various genres, offering both single-player and multiplayer experiences.

Prior to founding Horizon Interactive, I held several leadership roles in the gaming industry. I was the Senior Vice President of Games at MegaGames, where I led the development of several popular games. Before that, I was the Founder and Chief Product Officer at PLAYLOUNGE, a company that went public and has achieved significant success in the gaming market. I also served as the Vice President of Commerce/Advertising at SocialSphere, a social networking site.

Throughout my career, I have gained extensive experience in game development, monetization strategies, and the gaming industry's business landscape. My background has given me a deep understanding of the skills and expertise required to succeed in this highly competitive field.

I have had the pleasure of working closely with Mr. Patel since 2016, first at MegaGames, where he served as the General Manager of MegaGames Poker, and later at Horizon Interactive, where he is a founding partner and our Chief Product Officer. Throughout our collaboration, I have been consistently impressed by his extraordinary abilities and his unwavering dedication to driving innovation and growth in the gaming industry.

During his tenure at MegaGames, Mr. Patel demonstrated remarkable leadership and strategic vision. MegaGames, founded in 2007, is a pioneering social game developer best known for hits like FarmQuest, Letters With People, and MegaGames Poker. It became a leader in mobile and social gaming, leveraging platforms like SocialNet and later mobile ecosystems. In May 2022, PowerPlay Interactive, a major video game publisher, acquired MegaGames for $12.7 billion, marking one of the largest deals in gaming history.

As the General Manager of MegaGames Poker, Mr. Patel was responsible for the product vision, strategy, and operations of the $150 million business across mobile and PC platforms. He led a team of over 80 engineers, product managers, designers, producers, QA, and artists across San Francisco, Austin, and Toronto. Under his leadership, MegaGames Poker experienced significant growth and solidified its dominance in the competitive online gaming market.

In 2017, MegaGames Poker's mobile revenue increased by 78% year-over-year, largely due to enhancements in game features and operations. This success contributed to MegaGames' overall strong performance, with the company's revenue reaching $224.6 million in Q3 2017, up 23.1% compared to the previous year. MegaGames Poker accounted for 24% of the total online game bookings, making it one of the top-performing games in MegaGames' portfolio. This remarkable growth was a testament to Mr. Patel's ability to drive sustained revenue growth and enhance user engagement.

Mr. Patel's efforts were instrumental in reversing years of decline in the MegaGames Poker franchise. His strategic initiatives, such as introducing new features like challenges, leagues, and poker week, significantly boosted player engagement and monetization. His leadership and vision were key factors in MegaGames Poker's success, which in turn contributed to MegaGames' broader business turnaround.

Beyond his impressive achievements at MegaGames, Mr. Patel has continued to demonstrate his extraordinary abilities at Horizon Interactive, where he serves as a founding partner and Chief Product Officer. Horizon Interactive is a game developer that operates 15 games in active development across various genres, including collectible card games, massively multiplayer online games, and casual games. Our games have been downloaded over 20 million times in the past year, and we have more than 5 million monthly active players. Horizon Interactive also operates PlayHub.com, an online gaming platform that hosts a vast collection of games across various genres, offering both single-player and multiplayer experiences.

As Chief Product Officer, Mr. Patel drives the strategic vision and product development for the company. He leads all game and product teams, ensuring the delivery of captivating and innovative gaming experiences to a diverse user base. His leadership and expertise have been instrumental in Horizon Interactive's growth and success.

Mr. Patel played a pivotal role in Horizon Interactive's acquisition of PlayHub (valued at over $100 million) and Game Arcade (valued at over $5 million). He oversaw all phases of these acquisitions, from due diligence and valuation to integration and assessment. His efforts have significantly enhanced Horizon Interactive's portfolio and market presence.

In addition to his work on acquisitions, Mr. Patel oversees the IP acquisition process for Horizon Interactive. He manages negotiations, legal compliance, and partnerships with major studios such as Paramount Pictures and Disney Studios to secure and utilize IPs effectively for high-impact game releases. His ability to forge and maintain strategic partnerships has been a key driver of Horizon Interactive's success.

Mr. Patel also directs the strategic direction for the company's products, defining the product vision and long-term roadmap while managing product budgets to ensure a strong return on investment. He leads cross-functional teams of product managers, engineers, designers, and analysts to deliver unique and engaging experiences to players by innovating on game design, product features, and economy design.

Mr. Patel's contributions to Horizon Interactive have been invaluable. His leadership, strategic vision, and ability to drive innovation have been key factors in the company's growth and success. He has consistently demonstrated his extraordinary abilities and has been a driving force behind Horizon Interactive's achievements.

Beyond his impressive achievements at Horizon Interactive, Mr. Patel's expertise and insights are highly sought after in the broader gaming industry. He has been invited to speak at prestigious industry events such as the Product (Un)conference, where he shares his knowledge and experience with fellow professionals. His thought leadership and contributions to the field have earned him recognition and respect from his peers.

In addition to his speaking engagements, Mr. Patel has been invited to be a mentor for Venture Partners' Speedrun program, a prestigious initiative aimed at supporting and advising startups in the gaming industry. His role as a mentor underscores his deep expertise and his commitment to fostering the next generation of gaming entrepreneurs.

Mr. Patel's extensive experience, strategic vision, and ability to drive innovation have made him a highly respected figure in the gaming industry. His contributions to Horizon Interactive and his involvement in industry events and programs demonstrate his unwavering dedication to advancing the field and supporting the growth of the gaming community.

In conclusion, Mr. Patel's extraordinary abilities in product management and development, coupled with his unwavering dedication to driving innovation and growth, make him an invaluable asset to any organization. His impressive track record at MegaGames, his pivotal role in Horizon Interactive's success, and his respected presence in the broader gaming industry underscore his remarkable qualifications and contributions. I am confident that Mr. Patel will continue to make significant strides in the field and bring immense value to any endeavor he undertakes. I wholeheartedly recommend him as an individual of extraordinary ability in the field of product management and development.

Sincerely,

Jay Bennett Chief Executive Officer Horizon Interactive
final:
Dear Reviewing Officer, 

I am excited to offer my enthusiastic endorsement of Mr. Arjun Patel. Mr. Patel is a highly talented professional in the field of the field of product management for video games and I can undoubtedly state that he is an individual of extraordinary ability and talent. 

To provide some context, I am the Chief Executive Officer at Horizon Interactive, a game development company with 15 games currently in active development across various genres, such as collectible card games, massively multiplayer online games, and casual games. Our titles have achieved over 20 million downloads in the past year and maintain more than 5 million monthly active players. Additionally, Horizon Interactive operates PlayHub.com, a comprehensive online gaming platform that offers a wide range of games, including both single-player and multiplayer experiences. Before founding Horizon Interactive, I held several leadership roles in the gaming industry, including Senior Vice President of Games at MegaGames, where I spearheaded the development of numerous popular games. I was also the Founder and Chief Product Officer at PLAYLOUNGE, a company that successfully went public, and Vice President of Commerce/Advertising at SocialSphere, a social networking site. My career has provided me with extensive experience in game development, monetization strategies, and the business landscape of the gaming industry, equipping me with a deep understanding of the skills and expertise necessary to thrive in this highly competitive field.

I have had the pleasure of working closely with Mr. Patel first at MegaGames, where he served as the General Manager of MegaGames Poker, and later at Horizon Interactive, where he is a founding partner and our Chief Product Officer. Throughout our collaboration, I have been consistently impressed by his extraordinary abilities and his unwavering dedication to driving innovation and growth in the gaming industry.

During his tenure at MegaGames, Mr. Arjun Patel demonstrated exceptional leadership and strategic acumen, significantly contributing to the company's success. MegaGames, widely recognized for its pioneering social games such as FarmQuest, Letters With People, and MegaGames Poker, became a leader in the mobile and social gaming landscape by effectively utilizing platforms like SocialNet and mobile ecosystems. As the General Manager of MegaGames Poker, Mr. Patel was responsible for shaping the product vision, strategy, and operational execution of this $150 million business across mobile and PC platforms. He expertly managed a diverse team of over 80 professionals, including engineers, product managers, designers, producers, QA, and artists, located in San Francisco, Austin, and Toronto. Under his leadership, MegaGames Poker achieved significant growth and cemented its dominance in the fiercely competitive online gaming market.

In 2017, MegaGames Poker's mobile revenue increased by an impressive 78% year-over-year, largely due to enhancements in game features and operations implemented under Mr. Patel's guidance. This success was a major contributor to MegaGames' overall strong performance, with the company's revenue reaching $224.6 million, reflecting a 23.1% increase compared to the previous year. MegaGames Poker accounted for 24% of the total online game bookings, making it one of the top-performing titles in MegaGames' portfolio. Mr. Patel's efforts were instrumental in reversing years of decline within the MegaGames Poker franchise. His strategic initiatives, including the introduction of engaging new features like challenges, leagues, and poker week, significantly boosted player engagement and monetization. His leadership and vision were key factors in MegaGames Poker's success, which in turn contributed to MegaGames' broader business turnaround, underscoring his exceptional ability to drive sustained revenue growth and enhance user engagement.

Beyond his impressive achievements at MegaGames, Mr. Arjun Patel has continued to showcase his exceptional abilities at Horizon Interactive, where he serves as a founding partner and Chief Product Officer. In this role, Mr. Patel is responsible for steering the strategic vision and product development, leading all game and product teams to ensure the delivery of engaging and innovative gaming experiences for a diverse audience. His leadership and expertise have been instrumental in Horizon Interactive's consistent growth and success. One of his key contributions was playing a pivotal role in Horizon Interactive's acquisition of PlayHub and Game Arcade, valued at over $100 million and $5 million, respectively. Mr. Patel expertly managed all phases of these acquisitions, from due diligence and valuation to integration and assessment, significantly enhancing Horizon Interactive's portfolio and market presence.

In addition to his impactful work on acquisitions, Mr. Patel oversees the IP acquisition process for Horizon Interactive, negotiating deals and ensuring legal compliance in partnerships with major studios like Paramount Pictures and Disney Studios. By securing and effectively utilizing these IPs, he has driven high-impact game releases, demonstrating his ability to forge and maintain influential strategic partnerships, a key driver of Horizon Interactive's ongoing success. Mr. Patel also directs the strategic direction for the company's products, defining their vision and long-term roadmap while managing product budgets to guarantee a strong return on investment. He leads cross-functional teams comprised of product managers, engineers, designers, and analysts to deliver distinctive and engaging experiences to players, continuously innovating in game design, product features, and economy design. His invaluable contributions in leadership, strategic vision, and innovation have consistently driven Horizon Interactive's achievements and solidified his status as a cornerstone of the company's success.

Mr. Arjun Patel has been instrumental in securing strategic funding for Horizon Interactive, significantly enhancing the company's capability to innovate and expand. Under his leadership, Horizon Interactive forged a vital partnership with TetherTech, a trailblazer in blockchain technology with a strong focus on gaming applications. TetherTech, backed by a range of influential investors, recognized Horizon Interactive as a key strategic partner. This collaboration empowers Horizon Interactive to delve into the integration of blockchain technology within the gaming sector, focusing on digital asset valuation and the development of secondary markets within both closed and open game ecosystems. Mr. Patel's ability to cultivate such strategic alliances underscores his visionary leadership and commitment to propelling Horizon Interactive to new frontiers in the gaming industry.

Mr. Patel's expertise is deeply rooted in his extensive background with leading companies like DataSearch and GlobalLogic, where he played critical roles that honed his strategic and leadership skills. At DataSearch, a company known for its innovations in data integration and search technology, Mr. Patel was a key driving force behind the development of advanced data solutions. His efforts in building robust data systems and algorithms helped the company effectively address complex data challenges, ultimately leading to enhanced product offerings and market growth. His innovative approach to data integration set new standards within the company and laid a strong foundation for his future endeavors in product development and strategic management.

At GlobalLogic, Mr. Patel further sharpened his abilities by taking on increasingly significant responsibilities. As a leader at GlobalLogic, he was crucial in managing large-scale IT projects and delivering solutions that aligned with clients' strategic goals. His role involved collaborating with cross-functional teams to drive efficiency and ensuring the successful implementation of technology strategies in various industries. Mr. Patel's focus on delivering value through technology and his knack for building long-term client relationships greatly contributed to GlobalLogic's reputation as a trusted service provider. This experience equipped him with a comprehensive understanding of global business environments, preparing him for his future successes at Horizon Interactive and beyond.

Mr. Patel's expertise and insights have long been valued in the gaming industry, establishing his reputation as a respected authority among peers and industry leaders. His unique talent for combining strategic vision with practical experience made him a sought-after speaker at high-profile industry events, including the Product (Un)conference. Organized by Product Enthusiasts, this annual gathering serves as a pivotal exchange for a vibrant community of over 170,000 product management professionals. It attracts a diverse range of product managers, from newcomers to seasoned veterans, and features executives from global tech giants. Mr. Patel was notably one of the few speakers invited from the US, where he led a dynamic panel discussion titled "Deconstruct: How Games Keep You Hooked?" By delving into the intricacies of game design and player engagement, he offered valuable insights that resonated with attendees, enhancing their understanding and reinforcing his role as a key thought leader in the gaming community.

In addition to his speaking engagements, Mr. Patel has been invited to serve as a mentor for Venture Partners' Speedrun program, a prestigious initiative designed to support and advise startups within the gaming industry. This role is a testament to his deep expertise and his commitment to fostering the next generation of gaming entrepreneurs. As a mentor, Mr. Patel provides invaluable guidance on everything from strategic planning and product development to scaling operations and navigating market entry. His mentorship is not only about sharing knowledge but also about inspiring and challenging entrepreneurs to push boundaries and innovate. By leveraging his extensive network and experience, he helps these startups to connect with resources and opportunities that can accelerate their growth. His involvement with the Speedrun program underscores his dedication to giving back to the community and his belief in the potential of new talent to drive the future of the gaming industry.

Mr. Patel's extensive experience, strategic vision, and ability to drive innovation have established him as a highly respected figure within the gaming industry. His contributions to Horizon Interactive and his active involvement in industry events and mentorship programs testify to his unwavering commitment to advancing the field. Through his leadership, he not only pushes Horizon Interactive towards new heights but also plays a pivotal role in shaping industry standards and practices. His efforts extend beyond his corporate responsibilities; he is dedicated to cultivating a vibrant gaming community where ideas can flourish, and innovation is encouraged. By supporting initiatives that promote growth and learning, Mr. Patel continues to be a driving force behind the industry's evolution, proving that his influence is as much about his professional accomplishments as it is about fostering a collaborative and forward-thinking gaming ecosystem.

In brief, Mr. Arjun Patel exemplifies extraordinary ability and leadership within the gaming industry. His remarkable career spans influential roles at major companies like MegaGames, Horizon Interactive, DataSearch, and GlobalLogic, where he has consistently driven innovation and growth. At Horizon Interactive, as a founding partner and Chief Product Officer, his strategic vision has been pivotal in expanding the company's market presence and spearheading transformative projects, including key acquisitions and partnerships. His influence extends beyond corporate achievements, as evidenced by his significant contributions to industry conferences and mentorship programs like Venture Partners' Speedrun. Mr. Patel's dedication to nurturing the next generation of talent while pushing the boundaries of gaming technology underscores his commitment to advancing the field. His esteemed reputation, built upon a foundation of extensive experience, strategic foresight, and a passion for innovation, makes him an invaluable asset to any endeavor within the video game industry. I am confident that his continued contributions will leave a lasting impact, reinforcing his status as a leader and visionary in this dynamic field.

If you require any additional information or clarification regarding my recommendation of Mr. Arjun Patel, please feel free to contact me. I would be more than happy to provide further insights into his qualifications and contributions.

Sincerely yours,


Jay Bennett 
Chief Executive Officer 
Horizon Interactive, LLC
[email contact here]
